changelog.notes: Native macOS app via Tauri v2: bundled Node.js sidecar, optional Docker service management (Launch/Stop ChromaDB+Piston from the app), service health bar in UI, data stored in ~/Library/Application Support/studytrack/.
AI exam generator, embedded code lab with Piston sandbox, per-objective coding environment, GitHub-style activity heatmap, ChromaDB RAG integration, Docker stack with Makefile.
Initial beta release. GCP ML Engineer study plan, inline editing, JSON editor, notes, custom task types.
